Serstech receives 4.3 MSEK order from India
description: Serstech has today received a 4.3 MSEK order from its Indian partner, Kapri Corp. The order includes the Serstech Arx mkII and related software and will be delivered and invoiced in Q2 2026.

title: Advantest Announces Opening of Strategic Innovation Centers
description: TOKYO, April 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leading semiconductor test equipment supplier Advantest Corporation (TSE Prime: 6857) today announced the opening of two Advantest Innovation Centers—one located on the company’s campus in San Jose, Calif., and another currently under construction in nearby Sunnyvale, Calif. title: Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos launches an 8.5% yield bond offering
description: The investment company Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos (AEI), managed by Lords LB Asset Management, is launching a EUR 2 million bond issue with a fixed annual interest rate of 8.5%. The company, which manages assets worth EUR 165 million, increased its portfolio of operating solar and wind farms to 303 MW in April and is consistently executing its strategy to sell all developed and operational projects by the end of 2027.
